title: Patpat: a public proteomics dataset search framework.
author: Liao W Zhang X
content:
S-EPMC9933831 PMC9933831 Patpat: a public proteomics dataset search framework.

Summary

As the FAIR (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, Reusable) principles have become widely accepted in the proteomics field, under the guidance of ProteomeXchange and The Human Proteome Organization
